author: Dale de Silva
description: Hand write or draw directly between paragraphs using a digital pen, stylus, or Apple pencil.

manifest.author: Dale de Silva
manifest.description: Hand write or draw directly between paragraphs in your notes using a digital pen, stylus, or Apple pencil. Useful for handwriting, sketches, scribbles, or even math equations and scientific notation. Runs on the tldraw framework and drawing provides an infinite canvas.
manifest.name: Ink

name: Ink

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
This is a **beta pre-release** and can only be installed manually or through the BRAT plugin. [See beta installations here](https://github.com/daledesilva/obsidian_project-browser?tab=readme-ov-file#-installation).

### Added this update:
- Files now saved in a new file format.
- Save your drawing embeds with specific framing: Two fingers or right mouse button to reframe. Cmd + right mouse button to zoom, or Cmd + scroll wheel.
- Frame the same file differently across multiple embeds.
- Full screen writing and drawing is now fully supported.
- Unified undo allows Cmd+Z across embeds and your Markdown note.
- Manual smoothing & pressure selection.
- Easier copy and paste.
- Customisable line height.
- Dominant hand setting.
- Hold middle mouse button to switch to eraser temporarily.

### Note:
- Existing Ink files will not convert to the new format in this release. This will be added in a later update.

▶️ **Watch the [release video](https://youtu.be/n6yKUBJshR4).**
releases.name: 0.5.0-beta

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
This is a **beta pre-release** and can only be installed manually or through the BRAT plugin. [See beta installations here](https://github.com/daledesilva/obsidian_project-browser?tab=readme-ov-file#-installation).

### Added this update:
- Scrolling is now possible while embeds are unlocked.
- All writing and drawing files are now saved as SVGs. This means they'll work even if Ink is uninstalled and even outside of Obsidian.
- Reading mode is now fixed (Though the styling is still a work in progress).
- If you edit an Ink file, any embed of the file will update automatically.
- Long pages with multiple embeds should now work much more fluidly.
- Inserting existing embeds will now give you a visual preview of the files.

### Broken this update:
- Drawing with your finger is no longer support for now (To allow for scrolling).

▶️ **Watch the [release video](https://youtu.be/2arL1jh8ihA).**

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### Added this update:
- Fixed update notice text colour in light mode (That's why you can read this!).
- Moved Undo/Redo buttons to prevent accidental back button taps.
- Added new command icons.
- Added extra blank lines while writing.
- Fixed some visual theming bugs.

▶️ **Watch the [release video](https://youtube.com/live/50EpBdPwrxY).**

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
This update publicly releases all improvements from the previous 0.3.* beta releases.

### New changes since the last beta release:
- Tweaked initial drawing zoom.
- Updated command icons.

▶️ **Watch the [release video](https://www.youtube.com/live/_B2a9zTxb28?si=Ri5qozcHhlqVRRD9).**

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
This is a **beta pre-release** and can only be installed manually or through the BRAT plugin. [See beta installations here](https://github.com/daledesilva/obsidian_project-browser?tab=readme-ov-file#-installation).

### Fixed this update:
- New writing and drawing embeds don't show up in files pane until restart. #56
- Build errors on npm run. #94 (Thanks @davidleejy)
- Page scrolling when locking embeds.

### Added previously but missed:
- Custom dimensions for drawing embeds. #39 (Thanks @bjornfiles)
releases.name: 0.3.2-beta

releases.author: daledesilva
releases.description:
#### This release includes these changes:
- Ability to resize drawing embeds (Lock the embed to save the size).
- Ability to toggle visible grid in drawings.
- Added temporary icons for commands.

Watch the [release video](https://youtube.com/live/gLserf5LLD0?feature=share).

releases.author: daledesilva
releases.description:
#### This release includes these changes:
- Single click unlock for embeds (This is a test, let's see how everyone likes it).
- More seamless transitions between locked and unlocked writing embeds.
- Unlock multiple writing embeds at once (This is a test. Performance impact is unknown).
- Visible grid in drawing mode (Will be optional in the future).
- Many changes under the hood to lay groundwork for future updates and better efficiency.

Watch the [release video](https://youtube.com/live/iJ3i9ZYisEE).

releases.author: daledesilva
releases.description:
#### This release includes these changes:
- Issue #44 - Empty embeds flicker upon creation, when locking, or when switching to read mode. (Thanks to: @MrComputron )
- Added Placeholder image for empty drawing embeds.

releases.author: daledesilva
releases.description:
#### This release includes these changes:
- Issue #52 - Embeds not centering properly in some themes. (Thanks to: @tobias0409 , @tompaulick , @scosant , & @jaketae )

releases.author: daledesilva
releases.description:
#### This release includes these changes:
- Issue #57 - Converted attachment settings to allow for relative path to note. (Thanks to: @bartrand)
- Added extra setup tips for users using Obsidian Sync of iOS Scribble.
- Implemented "Remove" option for embeds

Watch the [release video](https://youtube.com/live/nRAABxAG62o).

releases.author: daledesilva
releases.description:
#### This release includes these changes:
- Issue #20 - Allows customising the folder ink files save into. (Thanks to: @tenebrisnox @ichmoimeyo @JeminiRiver @YkionArt )
- Added some testing infrastructure to help prevent future regressions.
- Fixed an issue where the month numbers in filenames were 0 indexed instead of 1 indexed (ie. January was 0, February was 1). Discovered when implementing a test!
- Fixed support button colouring.

Watch the [release video](https://www.youtube.com/live/9-YK8car634).

Updating to this pre-release version can only be done through the BRAT plugin (Instructions in [readme](https://github.com/daledesilva/obsidian_ink)).

releases.author: daledesilva
releases.description:
#### This release includes these changes:
- Issue #49 - Fixed welcome tips text colour in light mode. Thanks @ichmoimeyo !

releases.author: daledesilva
releases.description:
#### This release includes these changes:
- Added a welcome tutorial.
- Added a notice describing why strokes disappear.
- Added support buttons in settings.
- Added link to latest changes in settings.

Watch the [release video](https://youtube.com/live/5rVERLLwY7w?feature=share).

releases.author: daledesilva
releases.description:
#### This release includes these changes:
- Issue #24 - Fixed issue that prevented used on older Android devices (object.hasOwn error).
- Various small fixes.

Updating to this pre-release version can only be done through the BRAT plugin (Instructions in [readme](https://github.com/daledesilva/obsidian_ink)).

releases.author: daledesilva
releases.description:
#### This release includes these changes:
- Issue #30 - Prevent sidebars opening when swiping horizontally in edit mode.
- Issue #17 - It's now easier to tap on the toolbar buttons even if your pen slides a bit.
- Writing embeds now grow more discretely and with transition animation.
- Embed previews are now converted to SVG for much higher quality and more versatile styling.
- Lines & backgrounds are now coloured by CSS. (This means dark/light mode changes are immediate - Issue #38 )
- Options to show lines and background while handwriting is locked.
- Options to show frame and background while drawing is locked.

Watch the [release video](https://youtube.com/live/T7UYJuX4UyY).

releases.author: daledesilva
releases.description:
#### This release includes these changes:
- Added adjustable stroke limit to settings.
- Converted UI buttons to icons.
- Added overflow menu.
  - Copy writing or draw embeds.
  - Open draw files directly.
- Ability to insert copied files as references to copied file.
- Ability to insert copied files as references to duplicate of copied file.
- tldraw version update. Possibly speed improvements.

Updating to this pre-release version can only be done through the BRAT plugin (Instructions in [readme](https://github.com/daledesilva/obsidian_ink)).

releases.author: daledesilva
releases.description:
#### This release includes these changes:
- Issue #19 - Ink should no longer affect toolbars in other tldraw based plugins.

Updating to this pre-release version can only be done through the BRAT plugin (Instructions in [readme](https://github.com/daledesilva/obsidian_ink)).

releases.author: daledesilva
releases.description:
#### This release includes these changes:
- Drawing embeds now have a background colour that matches writing embeds (To help understand the drawing boundaries).

Updating to this pre-release version can only be done through the BRAT plugin (Instructions in [readme](https://github.com/daledesilva/obsidian_ink)).

releases.author: daledesilva
releases.description:
This is a rerelease of 0.1.172 to get around BRAT issues:

### Original 0.1.172 notes:

This is a bug fix release:
- These issues should be fixed: #14 #7 
  - FIles and embeds not being created (due to attachment folder settings), should now be fixed.
  - Files should now be correctly labelled 'am' or 'pm'.

As an alpha, it also contains several drawbacks that are explained in the original alpha release development diary video on YouTube. Follow on [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@DesignDebtClub/streams) or elsewhere for additional development updates.

releases.author: daledesilva
releases.description:
This is a bug fix release:
- These issues should be fixed: #14 #7 
  - FIles and embeds not being created (due to attachment folder settings), should now be fixed.
  - Files should now be correctly labelled 'am' or 'pm'.

As an alpha, it also contains several drawbacks that are explained in the original alpha release development diary video on YouTube. Follow on [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@DesignDebtClub/streams) or elsewhere for additional development updates.

releases.author: daledesilva
releases.description:
This is a bug fix release:
(If you downloaded 0.1.1, that release was buggy, please update to this).

- These issues should be fixed: #3 #5 #6 #9 #11 
- Embeds should now appear immediately upon creation.
- Ink should no long prevent file selection, interfere with shortcuts, or conflict with other plugins.

As an alpha release, it also contains several drawbacks that are explained in the original Alpha release development diary video on YouTube. Follow on [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@DesignDebtClub/streams) or elsewhere for additional development updates.

releases.author: daledesilva
releases.description:
The initial release of Ink for Obsidian (ALPHA release).
This release includes these features in basic form:

- Ability insert writing sections into markdown files.
- Ability insert drawing sections into markdown files.
- Ability to edit writing files directly.
- Ability to edit drawing files directly.

As an alpha release, it also contains several drawbacks that will be explained in a development diary video on YouTube.
Follow on [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@DesignDebtClub/streams) or elsewhere to be notified when that is available.
